# Starfly — machine-readable doc index
# https://starfly.dev/llms.txt

> Starfly is a non-human identity broker. RFC 8693 token exchange, WIMSE JWTs, OPA policy, CAEP revocation, MCP tool verification, federation sync.

## Site

- https://starfly.dev — product home
- https://starfly.dev/1.0/docs/ — documentation v1.0 (Starlight + Pagefind search)
- https://starfly.dev/terraform/ — Terraform provider subsite
- https://starfly.dev/api/ — OpenAPI reference (generated)
- https://starfly.dev/play/ — sandbox playground

## Repository

- https://github.com/raygj/project-starfly-fabrics — public source (service, provider, docs, website)

## Agent bootstrap

- AGENTS.md — Cursor/Claude agents read first
- sandbox/manifest.yaml — profiles and five use cases
- sandbox/run.sh — proof scripts

## Documentation v1.0

- /1.0/docs/getting-started/ — clone, build, dev mode, first exchange
- /1.0/docs/glossary/ — trust domain vs audience
- /1.0/docs/concepts/exchange/ — 124ns hot path invariant
- /1.0/docs/concepts/revocation/ — 30ms kill switch invariant
- /1.0/docs/integrators/token-exchange/ — RFC 8693 integrator guide
- /1.0/docs/integrators/mcp/ — MCP confused deputy mitigation

## Terraform provider

- /terraform/quickstart/ — build provider from terraform-provider/
- /terraform/resources/ — starfly_fabric, mcp_tool, ssf_stream, agent_identity, encryption_key
- /terraform/auth/ — mTLS and JWT migration

## Invariants

- 124ns exchange hot path — no new synchronous deps on exchange pipeline
- 30ms revocation kill switch — propagation latency not negotiable
